chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1147 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 Mr. Noor Muhammad, advocate for petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the petition if directions are issued to respondent No.1/Secretary to the Government of Sindh Local Government Department to decide the application of petitioner (Available at page-33 of the Court’s file) in accordance with law within a period of one month. Learned AAG extended no objection to this proposition. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
